subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Ancient Revealer, by Whose verses every mighty edifice hath been shaken. Verily, He hath come with the truth and speaketh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله منزل قدیم الذی بایاته تزعزع کل بنیان مرصوص انه اتی بالحق و ینطق
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
